历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10006 → 11007 → 9427 → 9631 → 9245, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years. From 2023 to 2025, there was a slight forward trend (ranking number decreasing). The 2025 baseline is about 9245, the best level in recent years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province was 68 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 77 in 2024, and 78 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 109, an expansion of about 39.7% compared to 2025, which has a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 62nd in 2021 → 57th in 2026, steadily improving, reaching a historical best in 2026. The overall strength and recognition of the school continue to strengthen. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (teacher ethics investigation incident, handled promptly by the school). Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 7th (high heat), with video exposure among the top in 211 universities. Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended it as a 'cost-effective Double First-Class', attracting high application attention. No obvious admission cutoff gaps were recorded. Fifth round discipline evaluation: Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding strength in the chemical engineering field. Among the admission majors, Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy), Chemistry (Basic Top-Notch), Computer Class, Automation Class, etc., are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting candidates. Majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged, but the school's Chemical Engineering/Materials are A-level disciplines, leading to polarization in major popularity. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 206,000, roughly the same as in 2025. The school is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. In 2025, the enrollment proportion in Guizhou was about 1.5% (total national enrollment about 598, Guizhou 9), with a small but stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9245, the significant expansion of about 39.7% in 2026 easing competition, the school's Soft Science ranking continuously improving to a historical best of 57th, high Douyin attention, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward (ranking number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 11249, with a range of 10749–11749.

Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (11749) are advised to focus on Tier 3 as the main choice, with Tier 2 as a reach. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (10749) can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors such as Hongde Academy and Chemistry Dual Bachelor's Degree. Candidates with rankings in the middle are advised to choose Tier 2 majors such as Computer Class, Automation Class, and Outstanding Engineer Academy as the main options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2027 → 1973 → 2056 → 2674 → 2592. From 2021 to 2023, they stabilized around 2000, but in 2024, they significantly shifted back to 2674, and in 2025, they slightly recovered to 2592. Over the past two years, the overall shift has been about 600 places backward. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 13 students in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 13 in 2025, remaining basically stable. The 2026 plan is still 13 students, with no change.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, the best in history, with overall strength continuously improving; reputation neutral/mixed in 2024; ranked 7th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high application attention; no records of file dropping; the university's liberal arts programs have no A-level discipline evaluation records; Law (Excellent Experimental Class) corresponds to the Law discipline, which has not been independently rated; Business Administration corresponds to the Business Administration discipline, which has not been independently rated; liberal arts majors mainly consist of Law and Economics/Management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has high social popularity (recommended), suitable for civil service exams and employment within the system; Business Administration is divided and under observation; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 93,000, a slight increase from 2025 (90,000), leading to slightly intensified competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has some appeal to liberal arts examinees from the Southwest region; the number of History Category enrollments is very small (only 13 students), with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2592, stable enrollment plan, slight increase in the number of History Category examinees in the province, improved university ranking, and high Douyin popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2562, with a range of 2101 to 3023.
